top_stories.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
top_stories.description: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working on a phone in collaboration with MediaTek, Qualcomm, and Luxshare.
top_stories.author: Ivan Mehta
top_stories.content: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working on a phone in collaboration with MediaTek, Qualcomm, and Luxshare.

top_stories.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
top_stories.description: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.
top_stories.author: Anthony Ha
top_stories.content: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

top_stories.title: Rethinking AI TCO: Why Cost per Token Is the Only Metric That Matters
top_stories.description: Traditional data centers only stored, retrieved and processed data. In the generative and agentic AI era, these facilities have evolved into AI token factories. With AI inference becoming their primary workload, their primary output is intelligence manufactured in the form of tokens. This transformation demands a corresponding shift in how the economics of AI infrastructure, […]
top_stories.author: Shruti Koparkar
top_stories.content: Traditional data centers only stored, retrieved and processed data. In the generative and agentic AI era, these facilities have evolved into AI token factories. top_stories.title: OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 in Microsoft Foundry: Frontier intelligence on an enterprise ready platform
top_stories.description: OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 will be generally available in Microsoft Foundry, bringing OpenAI’s latest frontier model to Azure and the enterprise teams building agents for real production work. The post OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 in Microsoft Foundry: Frontier intelligence on an enterprise ready platform appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.
top_stories.author: Naomi Moneypenny
top_stories.content: OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 will be generally available in Microsoft Foundry, bringing OpenAI’s latest frontier model to Azure and the enterprise teams building agents for real production work. The post OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 in Microsoft Foundry: Frontier intelligence on an enterprise ready platform appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.

top_stories.title: Accelerate Generative AI Inference on Amazon SageMaker AI with G7e Instances
top_stories.description: Today, we are thrilled to announce the availability of G7e instances powered by NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs on Amazon SageMaker AI. You can provision nodes with 1, 2, 4, and 8 RTX PRO 6000 GPU instances, with each GPU providing 96 GB of GDDR7 memory. This launch provides the capability to use a single-node GPU, G7e.2xlarge instance to host powerful open source foundation models (FMs) like GPT-OSS-120B, Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B (NVFP4 variant), and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B,...
top_stories.author: Hazim Qudah
top_stories.content: Today, we are thrilled to announce the availability of G7e instances powered by NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs on Amazon SageMaker AI.
